title: Shipwreck Reveals Fate of Vanished World War I Coast Guard Cutter
summary_full: The Tampa disappeared in 1918 with 131 British and American personnel and civilians aboard. It was the largest single American naval combat loss of life in World War I
summary_public: The Tampa disappeared in 1918 with 131 British and American personnel and civilians aboard. It was the largest single American naval combat loss of life in World War I
